name: agentos
description: The operating system for teams running AI agents

scripts.kill-ports: powershell -Command "@(3002,4000) | ForEach-Object { $p=(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).OwningProcess; if($p){Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host \"Killed port $_\"} }"
scripts.start: npm run kill-ports && concurrently "npm run server" "npm run dev"
scripts.setup: npm run db:up && cd apps/dashboard && npm install
